acceptance_criteria.text: ForgeLink Settings has an Agent apps / MCP section showing bridge build status, local API reachability, token-file state, and install targets.
The user can create, rotate, and revoke an MCP token file for external apps without exposing the token in renderer state, notifications, logs, screenshots, or persisted diagnostics.
ForgeLink presents copyable install commands or generated config paths for VS Code/Copilot, Claude Code, Codex, and ForgeWire/Fabric using the real local checkout path.
A built-in test path verifies the MCP bridge can reach the local ForgeLink API and can create a safe test agent-channel message.
Automated tests cover token-file create/rotate/revoke behavior, renderer redaction boundaries, install command rendering, and MCP bridge health/test-message behavior.
